content.text:
<recommended_plugins>
Here is a list of plugins that are available but not installed. If the user's query would benefit from one of these plugins, use the `request_plugin_install` tool to suggest that they install it. Pass the parenthesized ID as `plugin_id`. For example, suggest the Google Drive plugin if the query could possibly be better answered with access to Google Drive.

- Atlassian Rovo (atlassian-rovo@openai-curated-remote)
- Box (box@openai-curated-remote)
- Figma (figma@openai-curated-remote)
- Gmail (gmail@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Calendar (google-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Drive (google-drive@openai-curated-remote)
- Notion (notion@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Calendar (outlook-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Email (outlook-email@openai-curated-remote)
- SharePoint (sharepoint@openai-curated-remote)
- Slack (slack@openai-curated-remote)
- Teams (teams@openai-curated-remote)
</recommended_plugins>

Review the code changes against the base branch 'main'. The merge base commit for this comparison is 9d3c996c8807dd2be6c849f5902143a0335bf41e. Run `git diff 9d3c996c8807dd2be6c849f5902143a0335bf41e` to inspect the changes relative to main. Provide prioritized, actionable findings.

input.input: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"grep -n -E 'code review|branch-diff|9d3c|cyspbot' /Users/cysp/.codex/memories/MEMORY.md | head -30; cat /Users/cysp/.agents/skills/code-review/SKILL.md","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git rev-parse 9d3c996c8807dd2be6c849f5902143a0335bf41e && git status --short && git log --oneline 9d3c996c8807dd2be6c849f5902143a0335bf41e..HEAD && git diff --stat 9d3c996c8807dd2be6c849f5902143a0335bf41e && git diff --find-renames 9d3c996c8807dd2be6c849f5902143a0335bf41e","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":50000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git rev-parse HEAD; git diff --name-status 9d3c996c8807dd2be6c849f5902143a0335bf41e; git branch --show-current; git status --porcelain=v2","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)
